## Interaction Flow

### User Flow

{Describe in plain language how a user action flows through the system.}

Example:
> User submits login form → Web UI calls `authenticateUser(email, password)` → Auth module validates credentials → returns session token → Web UI stores token and redirects

### Function Call Map

```
{ModuleA}.{functionA}(params)
  └─ calls {ModuleB}.{functionB}(params)
       └─ calls {ModuleC}.{functionC}(params)
            └─ returns {data}
       └─ returns {data}
  └─ returns {data}
```

> All inter-module calls are written as function calls. Deployment routing (direct call vs REST) is handled by the smart call wrapper — not written in business code.

Tier 3 — Depends on Tier 2:
  {module-name}  [{module-type}]  depends on: {tier-2-module}
